extract: Uxie (Japanese: ユクシー Yuxie) is a Psychic-type Legendary Pokémon introduced in Generation IV. It is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon. Along with Mesprit and Azelf, Uxie is one of the lake guardians created by Arceus. It is known as the Being of Knowledge (Japanese: 知(ち)識(しき)の神(かみ) Chishiki no Kami, "God of Knowledge") in Sinnoh myths.
